detectors.description:
Reentrancy in SPYANYA._transfer(address,address,uint256) (SPYANYA.sol#641-757):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (SPYANYA.sol#703)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (SPYANYA.sol#771-783)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (SPYANYA.sol#709)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (SPYANYA.sol#791)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SPYANYA.sol#755)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (SPYANYA.sol#923)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (SPYANYA.sol#903)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (SPYANYA.sol#905)
	SPYANYA._rOwned (SPYANYA.sol#323) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SPYANYA._takeTeam(uint256) (SPYANYA.sol#917-925)
	- SPYANYA._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (SPYANYA.sol#877-913)
	- SPYANYA.balanceOf(address) (SPYANYA.sol#467-471)
	- SPYANYA.constructor() (SPYANYA.sol#405-431)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (SPYANYA.sol#755)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (SPYANYA.sol#931)
	SPYANYA._rTotal (SPYANYA.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- SPYANYA._getCurrentSupply() (SPYANYA.sol#1073-1083)
	- SPYANYA._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (SPYANYA.sol#929-935)
	- SPYANYA.constructor() (SPYANYA.sol#405-431)
	- SPYANYA.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (SPYANYA.sol#563-585)
